summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only; no GitHub mutations planned. The preflight artifact hydrated the first 20 listed PRs and reported no security-sensitive signal for those hydrated refs. Remaining listed refs were present in the job body but missing hydrated live state in the compacted artifact, so they are classified conservatively without close/merge/fix actions.
